data.title: Douglas Emmett (NYSE: DEI) discloses 2025 dividend tax breakdown: $0.275 per share income, gain, and return of capital.
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, Douglas Emmett, Inc. (NYSE: DEI), a real estate investment trust (REIT), disclosed the tax implications of its 2025 common stock dividends. Shareholders should seek advice from their tax advisors. The dividend details are as follows: The record date is 12/31, with the paid date to be announced. Dividends per share include ordinary income, capital gain, and return of capital. This includes the amount qualifying as a Section 199A dividend.

data.title: Energy Fuels Inc. will acquire Australian Strategic Materials to expand rare-earth production. New "mine-to-metal" champion forms.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Energy Fuels Inc., a prominent US company specializing in uranium, rare earth elements (REE), and critical materials, revealed its agreement to acquire all outstanding shares by entering a Scheme Implementation Deed (SID). As per the deal, Energy Fuels Inc. will obtain 100% of the issued share capital.

data.title: Airlock Digital releases independent study by Forrester Consulting showing measurable ROI & security impact of its technology.
data.description: Atlanta-based company Airlock Digital, known for its proactive application control and endpoint security solutions, recently revealed the findings of an independent study titled The Total Economic Impact (TEI) of Airlock Digital. The study, commissioned by Airlock Digital and carried out by Forrester Consulting, presented compelling insights into the economic benefits of implementing Airlock Digital's solutions. Released on January 20, 2026, the study sheds light on the significant impact of Airlock Digital's technology on businesses, showcasing concrete numbers and demonstrating the value proposition of their offerings.

data.title: Rio Tinto reported strong Q4 2025 production results, including record iron ore production in Pilbara. CEO praises operational excellence.
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, the Chief Executive of Rio Tinto, Simon Trott, has highlighted the exceptional production performance of the company's operations. Trott mentioned that there was a significant increase in production on both a quarterly and annual basis, attributing this success to the company's focus on operating excellence and project delivery. Record quarterly iron ore production was achieved in the Pilbara region, following a robust recovery from weather-related disruptions earlier in the year. Additionally, a major milestone was celebrated at the Simandou project. The specific production numbers and financial details were not provided in the rephrased text.

data.title: MNTN to reveal Q4 & full year 2025 financial results on Feb 10, 2026. Webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on Feb 10.
data.description: New York-based technology platform MNTN (NYSE: MNTN) will be reporting its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025, after the US markets close on Tuesday, February 10, 2026. The company's management will be conducting a live webcast on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results and offer a business update. The webcast details are as follows: Date - Tuesday, February 10, 2026.

data.title: Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN) to attend several investor conferences in Q1 2026, including Raymond James and Morgan Stanley.
data.description: Denver-based Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN), a leading AI-focused network provider, is scheduled to participate in several key investor conferences in the first quarter of 2026. These include the Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference on March 2, the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media, and Telecom Conference on March 3, the DB Internet & Telecom Conference on March 10, and the New Street BCG Connectivity Conference on March 26. The company will provide live webcast links for investor presentations when appropriate, offering stakeholders valuable insights into its strategies and performance.

data.title: American Tower Corp. discloses tax info for 2025 distributions: Cash distribution per share, ordinary taxable dividends, qualified taxable dividends, Section 199A dividends.
data.description: In Boston, American Tower Corporation (NYSE: AMT) has disclosed its tax reporting information for the 2025 distributions. Shareholders are advised to seek guidance from their tax advisors regarding individual tax implications. Common Stock details: CUSIP 03027X100, Ticker Symbol: AMT. Key dates: Record Date and Payment Date unstated. The Cash Distribution per share, Ordinary Taxable Dividends per share, Qualified Taxable Dividends per share, and Section 199A Dividends per share were announced for the mentioned tax year.

data.title: Alliant Energy Corp (NASDAQ: LNT) to release Q4 & year-end 2025 earnings on Feb 19 after market close. Conference call on Feb 20 at 9am CT. Webcast available.
data.description: In Wisconsin, Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) has announced the upcoming release of its fourth quarter and year-end 2025 earnings on Thursday, February 19th, post-market closing. A conference call to discuss these results is set for Friday, February 20th at 9 a.m. CT. The call, hosted by Lisa Barton (President and CEO) and Robert Durian, will be open to the public and accessible via webcast on www.alliantenergy.com/investors. Make sure to tune in and stay informed about Alliant Energy's latest financial updates.

data.title: PagerDuty appoints Scott Aronson to board; effective Feb 9, 2026. Tejada praises his leadership experience.
data.description: In San Francisco today, PagerDuty, Inc. (NYSE:PD), a prominent player in digital operations management, revealed the selection of Scott Aronson to their Board of Directors, starting from February 9, 2026. Jennifer Tejada, the Chairperson and CEO at PagerDuty, expressed excitement about this addition citing Aronson's impressive history in enterprise, go-to-market, and operations leadership. Tejada highlighted Aronson's success in expanding global operations, drawing on his accomplishments at companies such as Cloudera.

data.title: Champion Homes (NYSE: SKY) to announce third quarter 2026 earnings on Feb 3, 2026, with a conference call on Feb 4 at 8:00 A.M. ET.
data.description: TROY, Mich.-- Champion Homes, Inc. will announce its third-quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings after market closing on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. The company, listed as NYSE: SKY, has scheduled a conference call for the next day, Wednesday, February 4, 2026, at 8:00 A.M. Eastern Time to discuss the results. Investors and interested parties can access a live webcast of the call by visiting the Investor Relations section on the company's website.

data.title: Milan Kovac, ex-Tesla VP, joins DoorDash Board of Directors, effective Jan 16, 2026, company announced.
data.description: In San Francisco, DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ: DASH) has confirmed the appointment of Milan Kovac to its Board of Directors, starting January 16, 2026. Milan, who served as the Vice President of Optimus Robotics and Autopilot at Tesla previously, joins the board with a strong background in developing and expanding engineering initiatives focusing on AI, autonomy, and robotics. CEO Tony Xu praised Milan for his expertise in these areas, emphasizing his unique blend of technical proficiency and operational experience, making him a valuable addition to the team.

data.title: TWO schedules earnings release and conference call for Q4 2025 financial results. #TWO
data.description: In New York, TWO recently declared that they will release their financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company is set to host a conference call regarding these results. Stay tuned for more updates on this important announcement in the financial sector.

data.title: ServiceNow boosts Partner Program to speed up AI agent innovation globally. (Character count: 74)
data.description: In Las Vegas, ServiceNow has unveiled major improvements to its worldwide Partner Program in a bid to drive rapid advancement in AI agent technology.

data.title: U.S. AI Advisor highlights UAE and G42 as critical partners for U.S. AI competitiveness at Davos, mentioning a 5GW UAE-US AI Campus.
data.description: Progress continues to gather pace for the AI collaboration, with a strong push towards the UAE-US AI Campus and chip approvals, highlighted last year with a 5GW capacity. Key figures convened in Davos for discussions, including G42 Group CEO Peng, during the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting. The partnership is evolving significantly with momentum, as highlighted during the recent meet-up in Switzerland on Jan. 20, 2026.

data.title: MJLF & Associates appoints Alexander Tuff to their board, boosting growth.
data.description: Norwalk, CT - MJLF & Associates has named Alexander Tuff to their Board of Directors, a move intended to drive the company's growth to the next level. The appointment signifies a strategic step forward as MJLF & Associates aims to expand its operations and reach new milestones.

data.title: Bitcoin and Solana prices drop below key support levels after losing "golden cross". Traders bearish as sentiment shifts.
data.description: Both Bitcoin and Solana have experienced a significant drop as they lost what traders refer to as a "golden cross." This decline has resonated strongly, leading to prediction market traders adjusting their positions as bullish sentiment diminishes rapidly.

data.title: United Airlines beats Q4 estimates with $15.397B revenue, $3.10 EPS, exceeding $15.396B expectation, shares rise after hours.
data.description: United Airlines Holdings Inc released their fourth-quarter financial results after the market closed on Tuesday. The company reported a revenue of $15.397 billion, surpassing the estimated $15.396 billion. Their adjusted earnings for the quarter were $3.10 per share, exceeding analyst predictions of $2.94 per share. Key highlights include a 9% increase in premium cabin revenue, a 7% increase in basic economy revenue, and a 10% rise in loyalty revenue. Despite these positive figures, United Airlines Holdings stock is facing a decline, with analysts suggesting various factors responsible for the drop. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.
